description: Killed assumption: VR is not the causal lever for GPTZero human-passing. Prompt regime is. Pivoted product framing from 'voice preservation metric' to 'validated assembly prompt with VR as downstream diagnostic.'
notes: Pre-registered 54-variant pilot (n=54) surfaced the finding. Clarity 0.9 because the null is definitive on the sub-claim. Investment-avoided revised 0 → 12h on 2026-04-14: had we shipped claiming 35% VR as the causal mechanism and been challenged in a Part 2 interview ('but your pilot shows same-VR variants split across bands'), the live defense would have required redoing the pilot under pressure — ~10h research scramble + ~2h eval-methodology re-write. Pivoting pre-empted that entire failure mode.
